title: Tubella jimburae
taxonomy: Tubella jimburae is a species of fungus belonging to the family Tubellaceae and the order Agaricales. It is a type of fungus that grows in the ground, particularly in tropical regions of the world. The exact classification of Tubella jimburae may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered a type of agaric fungus. Tubella jimburae is classified as a genus of fungi that is thought to be closely related to other genera within the family Tubellaceae. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species within the fungal kingdom.
